topics.title: All-Star Game Food and Weight Gains
topics.summary: The studio recounts a series of indulgent meals consumed during the All-Star game, including hot dogs, burgers, and pancakes, while discussing a colleague's weight gain and upcoming television appearances.

topics.title: Comedy Tour Payment Disputes
topics.summary: The studio discusses a comedian's frustration over receiving an inadequate and delayed payment after opening for another act at a casino show.

topics.title: Richard Christie's Road Stories
topics.summary: The studio features Richard Christie recounting various crude anecdotes from his time on tour, including a story about cooking feces in a can and the history of his pet chicken.

topics.title: Sal Governali's Drunken Outbursts
topics.summary: The studio plays audio and reviews footage of Sal Governali engaging in public nudity, using racial slurs, and making inappropriate advances while intoxicated.

topics.title: Tragedy at Dial of Mattress
topics.summary: The show features a tribute to the son of a long-time sponsor from Dial of Mattress who tragically died in a lake accident while the host was on vacation.

topics.title: Kathy Griffin Divorce and Larry King Commentary
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding Kathy Griffin’s divorce, her ex-husband's theft of funds, and various pop culture topics including Nelly Furtado and Paris Hilton.

topics.title: Celebrity Encounters and Gossip
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity scandals, personal interactions with celebrities like Gwyneth Paltrow and Renee Zellweger, and the dynamics of social gatherings.

topics.title: Radio Rivalry and Industry Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio examines the career trajectory, ratings claims, and public persona of a Chicago-based radio personality while discussing FCC fine policies and the evolution of FM radio.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Growth and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the growth of Sirius satellite radio subscriptions following the launch of a new show, while also reacting to news regarding celebrity divorce details and legal issues involving public figures.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Competition and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses XM's market struggles against Sirius, the lack of FCC enforcement on Spanish-language radio content, Katie Couric’s move to CBS News, and various sports interviews involving NFL players and boxers.

topics.title: Radio Show Farewell and Family Tributes
topics.summary: The studio features a series of segments including an interview with Sean Alexander regarding sports and personal life, discussions about past radio guests, and the airing of recorded farewell speeches from the host's family members.

topics.title: Family Tributes and Phone Call Segments
topics.summary: The show features a series of pre-recorded speeches from family members followed by a segment of sexually explicit phone calls.

topics.title: Media Industry News and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The studio discusses industry news regarding CBS Radio layoffs, the potential relationship between Jim Carrey and Jenny McCarthy, and personal anecdotes involving various guests and colleagues.

topics.title: Celebrity Gossip and Middle East Conflict
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity rumors involving Angelina Jolie, Lindsay Lohan, and Tori Spelling before transitioning to a segment on the geopolitical tensions in the Middle East.

topics.title: Middle East Conflict and Domestic News
topics.summary: The studio covers reports on the Iraq War, the death of a Hooters executive, the landing of the Space Shuttle Discovery, and a woman's arrest for making a non-emergency 911 call to request a "cute" officer.
